description: Trigger queries for testing the use-authoring-skills description. Run each query 3+ times and compute trigger rate.

queries.query: I need to create a new agent skill for processing PDFs. Walk me through the whole thing.
Audit this skill and tell me what's wrong: name: data-tool, description: Helps with data.
My skill's description never triggers even when it should. How do I fix it?
Write evals for a skill that creates React components from design specs.
I have two skills that seem to overlap — one handles code review and another handles PR review. Should I merge them?
my boss wants me to build a reusable agent capability for our team's workflow — where do I start?
This instruction set is confusing and the agent keeps ignoring it. How do I make it follow the rules?
Score my skill quality and tell me if it's ready to ship.
I wrote a skill but I'm not sure about the frontmatter format. Can you check it?
Package this skill for distribution — it needs validation scripts and a proper structure.
Write a Python function that reads a CSV and uploads each row to our PostgreSQL database.
Fix the bug in my React component where the state doesn't update on click.
Create a new REST API endpoint for user registration with Express.js.
What's the difference between git merge and git rebase?
Update the formulas in my Excel budget spreadsheet to include tax calculations.
Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions for my Node.js project.
Convert this JSON file to YAML format.
Write unit tests for this authentication middleware.
Explain how the transformer architecture works in large language models.
Refactor this monolithic function into smaller, testable units.
